nodes.name: Green-tailed towhee
nodes.summary: Green-tailed towhee（Green-tailed towhee，学名 Pipilo chlorurus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括气候变化。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: In lower areas it inhabits shrub-steppe, a grassland with sagebrush, other brushy plants, and scattered trees

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The only identified threat is "ecosystem stresses" resulting from climate change. It is considered fairly common throughout its breeding range. "Destruction of large areas of sagebrush and reseeding with grasses for cattle probably had substantial negative impact on Green-tailed Towhees."
